name: Pill
description: A small rounded tag/chip: a single label on a sunken surface. Owns its full style — references tokens only. Override `background` via the Ref's style for other tones.
whenToUse: A compact tag/category/attribute chip (e.g. card feature tags). Compose via a Ref, mapping label to a host field, or use as an Each `template` to read the per-item label.
